title: Fusion Better Stained Glass
description: Improves stained glass using Fusion (Connected Textures) and color palette from Create: Framed
body:
Improves the default ugly and old stained glass textures to one like glass, improving the design and increasing the contrast of the block edges, while maintaining the same color palette as [Create: Framed](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-framed), and making all glass blocks and pane textures connected using [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures).

You can still use this without Fusion if you want to play vanilla, but textures won't connect.
